title: Mapo Tofu Stir Fry
description: A classic Chinese Sichuan dish made with tofu, ground pork, and a spicy sauce.

ingredients.name: tofu
ingredients.notes: Extra-firm, drained, and cut into small cubes

instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and cook, stirring constantly, for 30 seconds.
Add the mixed bell peppers and cook, stirring occasionally, for 3-4 minutes.
Add the tofu and cook, stirring occasionally, for 3-4 minutes.
Add the Sichuan bean paste, soy sauce, rice vinegar, and ground white pepper.
Stir to combine and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Add the mixed scallions and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the scallions are slightly wilted.
Optional: Serve with steamed rice or noodles.
